---
title: "SNaQ Results Visualization"
format: html
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(readr)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)
visual_output <- "visualization_results/snaq" 

setwd(dirname(rstudioapi::getActiveDocumentContext()$path)) 
source("../scripts/visual_utilities.R")
```

## Load and Parse Data
```{r load-parse}
df <- read_csv("../results/SNaQ_summary.csv") %>%
  mutate(
    dup_loss_rate = as.numeric(str_extract(parameter_setting, "(?<=DUP)[0-9.]+")),
    RV = factor(str_extract(parameter_setting, "(?<=RV)[A-Z]+"),
                levels = c("N", "G", "L", "GL")),
    SF = as.numeric(str_extract(parameter_setting, "(?<=SF)[0-9.]+")),
    n_ind = as.integer(str_extract(parameter_setting, "(?<=N_ind)[0-9]+")),
    genelen = as.factor(str_extract(parameter_setting, "(?<=genelen)[0-9]+")),
    pct_H0 = `H=0Accepted`,
    pct_H1 = `H=1Accepted`,
    pct_H_greater = `H>1Accepted`
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(RV))
```

## Hypothesis Acceptance by Rate Variation and Duplication/Loss Rate
```{r plot-hypothesis-acceptance-grid}
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 8
source("../scripts/visual_utilities.R") 
# For SNaQ data
p <- plot_hypothesis_acceptance_grid(df, 
  value_col_prefix = "pct_",
  h_greater_col = "pct_H_greater",
  output_dir = "../visualization_results/snaq",
  output_filename = "SNaQ_model_choice.png",
  plot_title = "SNaQ model choice")
# Display the plot
print(p)
```


## H=0 Hypothesis Acceptance by Duplication/Loss Rate
```{r plot-hypothesis-acceptance-H0-by-rate-variation}
#| fig-width: 12
#| fig-height: 6

# Plot H=0 (tree) acceptance percentage by rate variation
p_h0 <- plot_hypothesis_acceptance_H0_by_rate_variation(
  df,
  h0_col = "pct_H0",
  output_dir = "../visualization_results/snaq",
  output_filename = "SNaQ_hypothesis_typeIerror_H0.pdf",
  y_range = c(-1, 6),
  plot_title = "SNaQ type-I error rate by duplication/loss rate")

# Display the plot
print(p_h0)
```


## True Graph Recovery by Duplication/Loss Rate
```{r}
source("../scripts/visual_utilities.R") 
p_recovery_aggregated <- plot_true_graph_recovery_lines_aggregated(df, 
  output_dir = "../visualization_results/snaq",
  y_range = c(60, 102),
  output_filename = "SNaQ_true_graph_recovery_lines_aggregated.png",
  plot_title = NULL)
print(p_recovery_aggregated)
```

```{r}
#| fig-width: 12
#| fig-height: 6
# Plot H=1 only recovery rates
p_h1_only <- plot_true_graph_recovery_H1_only(df,
  output_dir = "../visualization_results/snaq",
  output_filename = "SNaQ_true_graph_recovery_H1_only.pdf",
  plot_title = "SNaQ true graph recovery under H=1")

# Display the plot
print(p_h1_only)
```


```{r plot-true-graph-recovery}
#| fig-width: 16
#| fig-height: 8

# Plot true graph recovery across all parameter combinations
# p2 <- plot_true_graph_recovery_lines(df,
#   output_dir = "../visualization_results/snaq",
#   output_filename = "SNaQ_true_graph_recovery_lines.pdf")
# # Display the plot
# print(p2)
```
